scholarship_details: Merit-cum-Means (MCM) scholarship offers tuition fee waiver + allowance. Various private and alumni scholarships are also available.
MCM scholarships for 25% of students. Institute free studentship and various industry-sponsored awards.
MCM scholarships covering 67% tuition waiver. SC/ST scholarship schemes and multiple private donor scholarships.
Need-based financial aid covering up to 100% of tuition fees. Special scholarship schemes for SC/ST and minority groups.
Merit scholarships and fellowships from government agencies (ICMR; CSIR) for PG students. Small stipends for MBBS students.
Post-matric scholarships; Delhi University student aid fund; and various college-specific trust scholarships.
BHU student welfare fund scholarships; blind student assistance; and various national/state scholarship support.
Merit and Merit-cum-Means (MCM) scholarships covering 25% to 100% of tuition fees for deserving candidates.
Scholarships for academy toppers; sports scholarships; and interest subsidy on education loans.
Merit-cum-Means scholarships; UGC junior research fellowships (JRF); and university research fellowships.
Central sector scholarship schemes; State government scholarships; and fee waivers based on parental income.
VITIgnite scholarships for state board toppers (100% fee waiver); merit-based discounts on VITEEE ranks.
SRM founder's scholarship (100% waiver for top ranks); merit scholarships; and socioeconomic performance waivers.
100% scholarship for students with 93%+ aggregate in 12th; 50% for 88%+; and sports/alumni discounts.
Scholarships based on SUAT rank; 12th board percentage (up to 100% waiver); and sibling discounts.
Scholarships based on LPUNEST performance; 12th percentage; JEE Main rank; and national level sports awards.
CUCET scholarship offering up to 100% waiver based on score. Special sports and defense personnel discounts.
Tuition fee waivers up to 100% based on 12th board marks; JEE Main percentile; or SAT score.
Merit-based scholarships for high achievers in 12th; discounts for female candidates and Uttarakhand state residents.
Merit-based scholarship based on JEE Main ranks; 12th aggregate; and sports quota.
